query:
select m.image_id,
                  tml_switchboard.image_source_usable($1, m.image_id) as "usable!",
                  not exists (
                      select 1
                      from tml_switchboard.image_group_grants ggr
                      where ggr.group_id = $2 and ggr.permission = 'use'
                        and not tml_switchboard.image_source_usable(ggr.subject_id, m.image_id)
                  ) as "usable_by_grantees!"
           from tml_switchboard.image_group_members m
           where m.group_id = $2 and m.generation = $3
           order by m."index"
